request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - another attempted attack on our city's infrastructure. We're lucky it failed, but how many more close calls before we act? Our current security agencies need stronger tools to stop these threats before they happen. Look at how Germany's expanded domestic security powers helped them prevent multiple attacks last year. We can't wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurity #SafetyFirst
